name: Bacon, Cabbage and Pasta Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 (16 oz.) package Green Giant frozen pasta and vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a large saucepan until crisp; remove the bacon and drain on paper towels.
2. Crumble the bacon.
3. Cook the cabbage in the broth until crisp-tender.
4. Stir together the crumbled bacon, broth, frozen pasta and vegetables, and water into the cabbage.
5. Bring to a boil; stir.
6. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 6 to 8 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
